positive_prompt: Set header height to 64px, navigation link padding to 16px horizontal and 0px vertical, font-size to 14px, font-weight to 500, and contrast ratio to at least 4.5:1 for text on background. Retained 16px horizontal padding, deleted conflicting 24px padding.
negative_taboo: Do not use dynamic padding that shifts layout.

positive_prompt: Set grid gap to 24px, card border-radius to 8px, card internal padding to 20px, shadow spread to 4px, and maximum card width to 320px. Retained 24px grid gap, deleted conflicting 16px gap.
negative_taboo: Do not use inconsistent margin values for grid items.

positive_prompt: Use Design Token --space-16 for padding, --radius-8 for border-radius, --color-surface-elevated for background. Runtime constraints: hover transition must be 200ms ease-in-out, shadow opacity increases by 10%, minimum touch target is 44x44.
negative_taboo: Do not use hardcoded pixel values for padding or radius.

positive_prompt: Apply --font-h1 for page titles and --color-text-primary. Runtime constraints: letter-spacing changes by -0.5px at 768px breakpoint, line-height is 1.2, animation fade-in duration is 300ms, layout shift is 0px.
negative_taboo: Do not mix rem and px values arbitrarily in type scales.

positive_prompt: default: bg #1677FF, text #FFFFFF, border transparent. hover: bg #4096FF, cursor pointer. active: bg #0958D9, transform scale(0.98). disabled: bg #F5F5F5, text #B8B8B8, cursor not-allowed. focus-visible: outline 2px solid #1677FF, offset 2px. error: N/A (buttons do not have an error state in this context).
negative_taboo: Do not rely solely on color change for focus.

positive_prompt: default: border #D9D9D9, bg #FFFFFF, height 32px. hover: border #4096FF. active: border #0958D9. disabled: bg #F5F5F5, text #B8B8B8. focus-visible: box-shadow 0 0 0 2px rgba(22,119,255,0.2). error: border #FF4D4F, text #FF4D4F.
negative_taboo: Do not remove focus rings without providing a fallback style.

positive_prompt: Fix condition: When modal opens, auto-focus first interactive element. Pressing Tab must cycle focus within modal. Pressing Esc must close modal and return focus to trigger button. Ensure aria-modal=true and role=dialog. Background overlay opacity must be 0.5.
negative_taboo: Fail condition: Focus escapes modal and moves to background content behind the overlay.

positive_prompt: Fix condition: SVG charts must contain a   and   tag. Provide aria-hidden=true on purely decorative grids. Assign role=img to the SVG wrapper. Ensure line charts have a contrast ratio of 3:1 against background. Set text-size adjustment to 100%.
negative_taboo: Fail condition: Screen readers read out raw SVG coordinate data instead of summarizing the chart.

positive_prompt: Dashboard charts must use minimum 4 distinct colors with WCAG AA contrast. Data table rows must be 40px high, font 13px, header text uppercase, row hover background #F0F2F5. Grid gutter must be exactly 24px.
negative_taboo: Do not use low-contrast gray text for data points.

positive_prompt: Product image aspect ratio must be exactly 1:1. Price text must be 18px, font-weight 700, color #F5222D. Discount badge padding 2px 4px, border-radius 2px. Add to cart button height 36px, full width.
negative_taboo: Do not truncate product titles below 2 lines.
